text.title: trade-off-stakeholder-communication Core Rules
text.summary: Migrated testable rules for trade-off-stakeholder-communication. Verify and refine before relying on for production.

rule.statement: Every stakeholder communication about a trade-off MUST preserve the key risk, even when simplifying for a non-technical audience. Verify the executive summary by asking: "Does this summary allow the executive to understand what they are approving and what could go wrong?" If no, rewrite.
rule.rationale: Agents drop nuance for executives, producing clean summaries that omit the downsides. When the downside materializes, executives feel misled. The communication must be simple but complete on risks — complexity can be omitted, risk cannot.
